testcase.name: finding-001 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has replayed messages without modeled deduplication Recommendation: Stop replay or add deduplication/idempotency guards before messages can be processed twice.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has replayed messages without modeled deduplication Recommendation: Stop replay or add deduplication/idempotency guards before messages can be processed twice.

testcase.name: finding-002 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has replayed messages without modeled deduplication Recommendation: Stop replay or add deduplication/idempotency guards before messages can be processed twice.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has replayed messages without modeled deduplication Recommendation: Stop replay or add deduplication/idempotency guards before messages can be processed twice.

testcase.name: finding-003 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=36000 before rebalance to 0 consumers Recommendation: Rebalance to a positive consumer count while backlog exists, or drain the queue first.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=36000 before rebalance to 0 consumers Recommendation: Rebalance to a positive consumer count while backlog exists, or drain the queue first.

testcase.name: finding-004 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan replay count=18000 lacks dedupe_key, idempotency proof, or dedupe window Recommendation: Add a dedupe_key, prove the handler idempotent, or model a positive dedupe_window_minutes before replay.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan replay count=18000 lacks dedupe_key, idempotency proof, or dedupe window Recommendation: Add a dedupe_key, prove the handler idempotent, or model a positive dedupe_window_minutes before replay.

testcase.name: finding-005 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=36000 while consumer group rebalance is not stable Recommendation: Wait for consumer-group stability before leaving replay/backlog processing exposed.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=36000 while consumer group rebalance is not stable Recommendation: Wait for consumer-group stability before leaving replay/backlog processing exposed.

testcase.name: finding-006 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=36000 with no active consumers Recommendation: Keep at least one active consumer or drain backlog before rebalancing to zero consumers.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=36000 with no active consumers Recommendation: Keep at least one active consumer or drain backlog before rebalancing to zero consumers.

testcase.name: finding-007 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:20

failure.message: Prose describes data deletion without executable restore/blast-radius preconditions. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Require a targeted scope, backup/restore validation, and capacity guard before destructive data operations.

testcase.failure: Prose describes data deletion without executable restore/blast-radius preconditions. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Require a targeted scope, backup/restore validation, and capacity guard before destructive data operations.

testcase.name: finding-008 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:18

failure.message: Prose describes destructive removal/forgetting without executable blast-radius checks. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Model the removal as an action guarded by targeted scope, capacity, and rollback/restore preconditions.

testcase.failure: Prose describes destructive removal/forgetting without executable blast-radius checks. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Model the removal as an action guarded by targeted scope, capacity, and rollback/restore preconditions.

testcase.name: finding-009 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:20

failure.message: Prose describes destructive removal/forgetting without executable blast-radius checks. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Model the removal as an action guarded by targeted scope, capacity, and rollback/restore preconditions.

testcase.failure: Prose describes destructive removal/forgetting without executable blast-radius checks. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Model the removal as an action guarded by targeted scope, capacity, and rollback/restore preconditions.

testcase.name: finding-010 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:26

failure.message: Prose mentions backfill/replay work without executable queue/backlog capacity guards. Missing condition(s): queue_depth_at_most, queue_has_consumers, queue_replay_deduplicated. Recommendation: Add queue_depth_at_most, queue_has_consumers, and deduplicated replay preconditions, or document an explicit limitation.

testcase.failure: Prose mentions backfill/replay work without executable queue/backlog capacity guards. Missing condition(s): queue_depth_at_most, queue_has_consumers, queue_replay_deduplicated. Recommendation: Add queue_depth_at_most, queue_has_consumers, and deduplicated replay preconditions, or document an explicit limitation.
